---
title: "Decoding the language of first impressions: Comparing models of first impressions of faces derived from free-text descriptions and trait ratings"
authors: "Jones, A. L., Shiramizu, V., & Jones, B. C."
year: 2024
date: 2024-01-01
pub-journal: "British Journal of Psychology"
volume: "1–16"
doi: "10.1111/bjop.12717"
pdf: "assets/papers/2024/jonesetal2024.pdf"
categories: [first-impressions, methodology]
---
